settings.title: Office Chairs
settings.description: Ergonomic task chairs for all-day desk work in open-plan and private offices.

settings.title: Guest & Visitor Seating
settings.description: Side chairs and guest seating for reception and waiting areas.

settings.title: Stacking & Training Chairs

settings.title: Stools & Counter Seating
settings.description: Height-adjustable stools and counter-height seating for collaborative areas.

settings.title: Lounge & Soft Seating

settings.title: Outdoor Seating
settings.description: Weather-resistant seating for patios, courtyards, and café settings.

settings.body: Canada's largest commercial furniture manufacturer — Global's task, conference, and stacking chairs are proven across Ontario's government offices, schools, and healthcare facilities.

settings.question: Are these chairs OECM-eligible under Agreement 2025-470?
settings.answer: Yes. Every chair in this collection — task, executive, conference, stacking, lounge, and stool — is covered under OECM Agreement 2025-470. Ontario school boards, hospitals, municipalities, colleges, and not-for-profits can purchase from Brant Business Interiors on an OECM purchase order without running an open RFP. Send the requisition to quotes@brantbusinessinteriors.com or call 1-800-835-9565 and reference Agreement 2025-470.

settings.question: Which brands do you carry for office seating?
settings.answer: Brant Business Interiors is a storefront-authorized dealer for Global Furniture Group, OTG, Heartwood, and ObusForme — the four brands you can quote on directly through this site. We also broker ergoCentric and Keilhauer through quote-only channels for ergonomic and premium executive seating. All six are Canadian-manufactured or Canadian-distributed and meet the commercial-grade specifications Ontario institutional procurement typically requires.

settings.question: What lead times should I budget for a volume seating order?
settings.answer: Lead time depends on brand and configuration. In-stock task chairs typically ship within a few weeks; build-to-order configurations (custom mesh, casters, arm and base options) take longer. Call 1-800-835-9565 with your model and quantity for a same-day lead-time estimate.

settings.question: What warranty covers the seating brands you sell?
settings.answer: Each manufacturer carries its own commercial warranty — Global Furniture Group, OTG, Heartwood, ergoCentric, and Keilhauer each publish coverage on frames, mechanisms, and upholstery on their product spec sheets. Brant Business Interiors coordinates warranty claims on your behalf for the life of the warranty: you file with us, we work with the manufacturer. Specific terms are listed on each product's spec sheet.

settings.question: Do you deliver and install seating across Ontario?
settings.answer: Yes. We deliver from Peterborough to school boards, hospitals, municipalities, colleges, and offices across Ontario, and we install on-site for multi-unit orders — typically 25 chairs or more. Single units ship via courier. Installation is quoted with the chairs (per-unit or flat-fee depending on configuration) and we coordinate timing with your facilities team through a single point of contact.

settings.hero_subtitle: Commercial seating for Ontario institutions — ergonomic task chairs, lounge, stacking, and outdoor. OECM-eligible.
settings.intro_text: The right chair changes how people work. Brant Business Interiors carries office chairs, guest seating, stacking chairs, stools, and lounge seating — commercial-grade builds designed for institutional environments. All OECM-eligible under Agreement 2025-470. Quote in 1 business day.
